title: Upgraded Cheese Slicer Set with 5 Replacement Wires & Heavy-Duty 5" x 8" Marble Board - Durable Cheese Cutter for Block Cheeses, Butter, and More - Essential Kitchen Gadget Tool - White
features: EASY CHEESE CUTTING MARBLE CHEESE SLICER: Get perfect slices of your favorite cheese with our premium marble cheese slicer. Made with 100% natural marble, it has non-stick qualities for easy food release and effortless clean-up. The cheese cutter is also equipped with 4 anti-slip silicone pads at the bottom for stability and safety.

VERSATILE KITCHEN TOOL: Slice through a variety of cheeses and even delicate hand-made soap with ease using our durable, food-grade stainless steel cheese slicer wire. The easy-to-clean design ensures pristine cleanliness every time. Perfect for use with mozzarella, swiss, parmesan, butter and more!

NO MORE WORRYING ABOUT BROKEN WIRES: Our Cheese Cutter comes with 5 thicker and stronger replacement wires to ensure you're always ready to slice through cheese. With a preinstalled wire and the added spares, you'll never have to worry about a broken wire again. The durable and reliable design makes it a must-have addition to your kitchen, for effortless and precise cutting every time. ( To install the replacement wire, Please refer to our installation video. )

SLEEK AND STURDY DESIGN FOR EASY CHEESE CUTTING: Make slicing cheese a breeze with our stainless steel wire cheese slicer. The non-slip rubber feet keep it securely in place, while the sleek and durable design makes it an attractive addition to any kitchen. Simply wash the slicer and store in a dry, well-ventilated spot between uses for long-lasting functionality.

AS A TRUSTED AMERICAN BRAND in kitchen wares, TOPULORS offers a full unconditional money-back on our cheese slicer for your peace of mind. Say goodbye to overpriced pre-sliced cheese and hello to effortless, perfectly cut cheese in seconds. Ensure the highest quality for your family's sandwiches and contact our dedicated customer service team for any concerns - your satisfaction is our top priority.
description: Product Description HEAVY DUTY BLOCK CHEESE CUTTER TIME-SAVING & SPACE-EFFICIENT CHEESE SLICER BOARD CUTTING DIFFERENT TYPES OF CHEESE Ideal for cutting different types of cheese or other foods. Such as you can cut cakes, eggs, and even delicate hand-made soap. EASY TO STORE AND CLEAN Dishwasher safe or just wipe it with a rag or use soap and water to clean. Convenient to store the slicer on your counter shelf or put it in your drawer. DURABLE AND LONG-LASTING USE STRONG CONSTRUCTION CHEESE CUTTER SLICER Crafted from natural marble with non-stick qualities for easy food release. Featuring an anti-slip cheese cutter with 4 silicone pads at the bottom for stability and safety. ERGONOMIC DESIGN HANDLE The handle is made of high-quality stainless steel and is strong and durable. Easy and comfortable to hold. The cheese slicer wire is crafted from durable, food-grade stainless steel. With 1 preinstalled wire and 5 extra wires included. EASY TO INSTALL REPLACEMENT CHEESE-CUTTING WIRE Step 1 Turn the handle counterclockwise. Rotate until loose. Step 2 Remove the old wire when the screw is loose, and connect the new replacement wire to both ends of the handle and the marble board. Step 3 Tighten the handle clockwise. Step 4 Slice through cheese effortlessly with this heavy-duty tool. Perfect for mozzarella, Swiss, Parmesan, butter and more! A HIGH-QUALITY GIFT FOR CHEESE LOVERS LOOKING FOR THE PERFECT GIFT FOR THE CHEESE LOVERS IN YOUR LIFE? LOOK NO FURTHER THAN OUR HIGH-QUALITY MARBLE CHEESE SLICER! TREAT YOURSELF OR A LOVED ONE TO THE ULTIMATE CHEESE-SLICING EXPERIENCE WITH OUR MARBLE WIRE CHEESE CUTTER TODAY! What types of cheese can I cut with your marble cheese cutter? TOPULORS cheese cutter is designed specifically for slicing hard cheeses like parmesan, cheddar, gouda, swiss, gruyere, etc. The solid marble base and stainless steel wire allow for clean cuts through firm, semi-hard, and hard cheese varieties. What are the dimensions of the cutter? The marble base measures 8 inches long by 5 inches wide. The stainless steel cutting wire is 4.25 inches long spanning the surface. The total height including the handle & bottom pad is 0.79 inches. Does marble actually help when cutting cheese? Is it better than wood or stainless steel? Yes, marble is a non-porous material, this feature makes it very hygienic and easy to clean, ideal for food preparation. Additionally, marble remains cool to the touch, which is beneficial when working with cheese blocks or keeping foods chilled. Can I cut soft cheeses like brie or mozzarella with it? We recommend sticking just to semi-hard and hard cheeses. Very soft cheeses may stick to the marble or get pulled by the wire. Is it easy to clean? Yes, just wipe down the marble base with a damp cloth or sponge. Use soap and water if needed. Do not submerge the Stainless steel handle in water.
